skipped.message: CLI list parsing creates CString items instead of CMergeMiniMtzItem — wrapper expects .fileName attribute

testcase.name: test_1hr2
testcase.failure: ccp4i2/tests/i2run/test_nucleofind.py:17: in test_1hr2 with i2run(args) as job: ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/contextlib.py:137: in __enter__ return next(self.gen) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ccp4i2/tests/i2run/utils.py:165: in i2run call_command( ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/management/__init__.py:194: in call_command return command.execute(*args, **defaults) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/management/base.py:458: in execute output = self.handle(*args, **options) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ccp4i2/db/management/commands/i2run.py:54: in handle self.i2_runner.parseArgs() ccp4i2/cli/i2run/CCP4i2RunnerBase.py:133: in parseArgs self.parsed_args = self.parser.parse_args(self.args) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:1877: in parse_args self.error(msg % ' '.join(argv)) ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2640: in error self.exit(2, _('%(prog)s: error: %(message)s\n') % args) ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2627: in exit _sys.exit(status) E SystemExit: 2

testcase.name: test_1hr2_raw
testcase.failure: ccp4i2/tests/i2run/test_nucleofind.py:27: in test_1hr2_raw with i2run(args) as job: ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/contextlib.py:137: in __enter__ return next(self.gen) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ccp4i2/tests/i2run/utils.py:165: in i2run call_command( ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/management/__init__.py:194: in call_command return command.execute(*args, **defaults) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/core/management/base.py:458: in execute output = self.handle(*args, **options) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ccp4i2/db/management/commands/i2run.py:54: in handle self.i2_runner.parseArgs() ccp4i2/cli/i2run/CCP4i2RunnerBase.py:133: in parseArgs self.parsed_args = self.parser.parse_args(self.args) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:1877: in parse_args self.error(msg % ' '.join(argv)) ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2640: in error self.exit(2, _('%(prog)s: error: %(message)s\n') % args) ../../ccp4-20260520/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2627: in exit _sys.exit(status) E SystemExit: 2
